name: skill-to-full-app
description: Turn portable Codex skills, SOPs, and agent workflows into AI-native full app plans and implementations.

interface.shortDescription: Convert skills and workflows into AI-native full apps.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that helps transform a portable Skill, SKILL.md, business SOP, or agent workflow into a production-shaped AI-native app with client, runtime, tools, state, human review, evals, traces, and deployment guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use Skill To Full App to turn this skill into an app.
Design an AI-native app from this SOP.
